prompt: A trading card frame template for a deckbuilding card game, dark fantasy arcane style, portrait orientation. Empty card frame with NO TEXT and NO LETTERS anywhere. Ornate purple and violet border with swirling arcane runes etched into the metal trim. Top section: rectangular nameplate slot (empty enchanted scroll). Center: large empty rectangular illustration window with faint glowing purple inner border. Bottom section: empty description panel made of arcane parchment with faint magical sigils in the corners (no readable text). Small mana crystal icon in bottom-left corner. Color palette: deep violet, midnight blue, silver trim, glowing purple highlights. Centered composition. NO TEXT, NO WRITING, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS.
